detail.description: Braden Shewmake doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Alejandro Osuna.
Braden Shewmake singles on a line drive to left fielder Alejandro Osuna. Nick Allen scores. Yordan Alvarez to 2nd.
Braden Shewmake doubles (1) on a fly ball to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Yordan Alvarez scores. Christian Walker scores.
Braden Shewmake singles on a ground ball to center fielder Luke Raley.
Braden Shewmake singles on a ground ball to right fielder Luke Raley, deflected by second baseman Cole Young.
Braden Shewmake singles on a line drive to right fielder Luke Raley.
Braden Shewmake singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Zach Dezenzo to 3rd.
Braden Shewmake singles on a line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Zach Dezenzo scores.
Braden Shewmake singles on a ground ball to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.
Braden Shewmake singles on a ground ball to left fielder Teoscar Hernández.
Braden Shewmake singles on a ground ball to center fielder Andy Pages. Nick Allen to 3rd.
Braden Shewmake homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.
Braden Shewmake homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field.
Braden Shewmake singles on a ground ball to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Cooper Pratt to 3rd. Braden Shewmake to 2nd. Cooper Pratt advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by first baseman Kyle Stowers.
Braden Shewmake doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Javier Sanoja.
Braden Shewmake singles on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Cam Smith to 3rd.
Braden Shewmake doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Andrew McCutchen.
Braden Shewmake homers (3) on a fly ball to right center field.
Braden Shewmake singles on a line drive to right fielder Will Benson. Nick Allen to 2nd.
Braden Shewmake doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Dylan Crews. LaMonte Wade Jr. scores. Yainer Diaz to 3rd.
Braden Shewmake singles on a ground ball to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Braden Shewmake singles on a line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras.
